message:
fix(ffs-harness): resolve clippy warnings in fuse_e2e tests (bd-liyeu, bd-r3vpm)

- Remove redundant .clone() calls where values are moved immediately after
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] to assert_rename_file_directory_type_mismatch_contract
